    <item>
        <guid>nba530278</guid>
        <title>Tyrese Maxey: Goes for 30 and 11 in Game 7 win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/tyrese-maxey-5158</link>
        <description>Maxey provided 30 points (11-18 FG, 2-4 3Pt, 6-6 FT), 11 rebounds and seven assists across 45 minutes during Saturday's 109-100 victory over Boston in Game 7 of the first round of the Eastern Conference playoffs.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sat, 02 May 2026 8:40:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530276</guid>
        <title>Joel Embiid: Leads Philadelphia to Game 7 win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/joel-embiid-3572</link>
        <description>Embiid finished with 34 points (12-26 FG, 1-4 3Pt, 9-11 FT), 12 rebounds, six assists and one block across 39 minutes in Saturday's 109-100 win over Boston in Game 7 of the first round of the Eastern Conference playoffs.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sat, 02 May 2026 7:30:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530275</guid>
        <title>Jaylen Brown: Drops 33 points in Game 7 loss</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/jaylen-brown-3894</link>
        <description>Brown contributed 33 points (12-27 FG, 3-9 3Pt, 6-6 FT), nine rebounds, four assists and three blocks across 40 minutes in Saturday's 109-100 loss to the 76ers in Game 7 of the first round of the Eastern Conference playoffs.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sat, 02 May 2026 7:20:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530269</guid>
        <title>Joel Embiid: Available for Game 7</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/joel-embiid-3572</link>
        <description>Embiid (abdomen) is available for Game 7 of the Eastern Conference first-round series against Boston, Adam Aaronson of PhillyVoice.com reports.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sat, 02 May 2026 4:01:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530268</guid>
        <title>Paul George: Good to go Saturday</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/paul-george-3114</link>
        <description>George (illness) will play in Saturday's Game 7 of the Eastern Conference first-round series against the Celtics, Adam Aaronson of PhillyVoice.com reports.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sat, 02 May 2026 3:47:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
